ab: kiya i Tabilas ku imuwag niyam.
imagal cami ka qutux cu imuwag.
en: There are five people in our family.

ab: tugal cami ka matasasuwayi’ ka qutux cu imuwag.
ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: masiqun kuwing ki yaba’, yaya’, qumisuwan na mamaliku ru qumisuwan na kanayril.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: ibabaweq i yaba’ mu, kinsac i yaba’ mu.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: mahikang i yaya’ mu, kuwisang i yaya’ mu.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: makiya imuwag i yaba’ ga makaal cami na kayi’ na Itaal.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the ethnic language with us at home.

ab: muhngeq i hahangiqan gabagan ga mamati’ cami musa’ i tinqalangan.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: maglu cami kina ququmisuwan rumakaap cu taka.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: balayq mu cubalay ku qutux mu cu imuwag.
en: I like our family very much.
